# Seed provenance

This project is seeded from [kinaar8340/toe](https://github.com/kinaar8340/toe)
(Flux Flywheels, Gauged Hopf Lattice, Emergent Reality).

Core modules and scripts were copied as a starting point for a focused
**invariant hunt → predictive model** pipeline. History is intentionally
new (fresh git repo); scientific lineage is documented here and in README.
